LAST_DONE:    SSE-3c: rate-limit + connection metrics on /api/stream/notifications. Added module apps/web/src/server/lib/sse-metrics.ts (5 functions + reset hook — process-local active-connection + reconnect counters with monotonic clamp-at-0 decrement). Wired into route.ts: (1) try/check `rateLimiters.api.check(ctx.userId)` after requireRouteAuth → returns 429 NextResponse on throw; (2) `incrementConnection()` after successful subscribeToChannel inside start try-block + `connectionTracked` flag; (3) `decrementConnection()` in cancel gated on connectionTracked to keep pairs balanced across subscribe-failure path. Tests: +6 sse-metrics + +6 route-handler (active count increment, decrement back to 0, no-increment on subscribe rejection, .check called with userId, 429-skips-subscribe with count staying 0, auth-failure short-circuits before rate-limit).
